description: In or out of the water, these nike floaters will go with you anywhere. Take to the great outdoors with confidence and style. Upper Synthetic straps for durability and easy maintenance Cushioning inside straps for comfortable Fit Adjustable velcro closures on ankle and front straps for a snug, customised fit Textured PU footbed Pull loop at back heel ACG nike branding Outsole Non-marking all terrain rubber outsole Grooves and lugs for absolute grip on all terrains Sandal care Wipe surface with damp, clean cloth to remove dirt Do not machine wash or store in direct sunlight
